messages.content:
## Welcome to Coplay AI!

I'm your AI-powered Unity assistant for fast content generation and development automation inside your workflow.

### Get help with Unity development tasks:
- Write and debug C# scripts
- Create controllers and AI behaviors
- Build UI from screenshots or descriptions
- Fix console errors

### Create assets:
- Textures & Images
- 3D Models (characters, props, environments)
- Sound Effects & Music & Voice Overs
- VFX & Particles

### Build and edit scenes using natural language:
- Place and arrange objects
- Generate terrain
- Create levels from descriptions
- Edit transforms, materials, and components

### Example Prompts
- "Create a player controller with smooth movement and camera follow"
- "Generate a pixel art dragon image with a transparent background. Size: 768×1024"
- "Generate a seamless brick wall texture with moss"
- "Create a medieval sword 3D model"
- "Make an explosion sound effect lasting 2 seconds"
- "Make a fire particle effect with smoke and embers"
- "Recreate this UI layout from the attached screenshot."
